nasb.text: but at the proper time manifested, even His word, in the proclamation with which I was entrusted according to the commandment of God our Savior,

esv.text: and at the proper time manifested in his word  through the preaching with which I have been entrusted by the command of God our Savior;

ccb.text: 祂在所定的时候，借着人的传扬将自己的道显明出来。我奉我们救主上帝的命令传扬这道。

csbs.text: 神在所定的时候，藉着传道把他的话显明了出来；我就是照着神我们救主的命令受了委托。
